description: Canonical paper-arch list — single source of truth for which (arch_id, k_win) cells appear in the paper's leaderboard and T-sweep artefacts. Cell key is (subject_model, arch_id, seed, k_win); each leaderboard entry below is a (arch_id, k_win) pair, evaluated across both subject models and the seed priority below.

probing_methodology.comment: All paper cells must be probed under this methodology. 'old' methodology rows in the manifest (Phase 5/5B's last_position / mean_pool / full_window at S=20) do NOT qualify and must be re-probed.

leaderboard_archs.comment: TFA full (predictive + novel codes) — Lubana et al. 2025 reference.
Faithful T-SAE port (Ye et al. 2025) at the paper's native k=20 sparsity.
Faithful T-SAE port at our k convention (k_win=500) for fair cross-arch comparison.
Dense MLC at Phase 7 k_win=500; per-layer label k_pos=100 is purely descriptive (single shared TopK).
Sparse MLC at Phase 5 density (k_win=100). Phase 5 IT ckpts already exist at this density (k_win=100 was Phase 5's only knob); base-side equivalent must be trained from scratch.
Dense agentic MLC (multi-scale contrastive, n_scales=3, gamma=0.5) at k_win=500.
Sparse agentic MLC at k_win=100 (Phase 5 density). Phase 5 IT ckpts exist; base-side must be trained from scratch.
Barebones TXC at T=5 (T-sweep peak point and one of the two T-sweep anchor archs).
Barebones TXC at T=16 (mid-T point; tests T-scaling claim at 3× the peak T).
Best TXC variant from Phase 5 — H8 stack (matryoshka H/L + multi-distance InfoNCE) + subseq sampling. mp/lp 3-seed champion in Phase 5.
Best Phase 7 single-cell at k_feat=20 (mean AUC 0.9358 on base). Barebones TXC + tsae-paper anti-dead stack only.
Best Phase 7 single-cell at k_feat=5 (mean AUC 0.8989 on base). H8 multidistance recipe = anti-dead + matryoshka H/L + multi-distance InfoNCE with auto-scaled shifts.

tsweep_barebones.comment: Existing Phase 7 T-sweep (preserved). All cells trained on base at seed=42 + seed=1; partial seed=2 for T=3..8. Carries forward unchanged into the paper.

tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.name: txc_bare_antidead_t<T>
tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.rationale: Minimal-recipe hill climb: barebones TXC + tsae-paper anti-dead stack only. Already trained at T={5,10,20}; would fill T ∈ {3,4,6,7,8,9,12,14,16,18,24,28,32}.

tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.name: phase57_partB_h8_bare_multidistance_t<T>
tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.rationale: Full H8 recipe (anti-dead + matryoshka H/L + multi-distance InfoNCE). Already trained at T=3..9; would fill T ∈ {10,12,14,16,18,20,24,28,32}.

tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.name: phase5b_subseq_h8_T_max<T>
tsweep_hillclimbed_candidates.rationale: SubseqH8 hill-climb (Phase 5B winner). Already explored in Phase 7 hill_climb scripts at T_max=12 (V1 trained); T_max=64 permanently lost on A40.

tsweep_hillclimbed_status: TBD — pending user decision on which family. Status here so future agents know the question is open, not forgotten.
